active.title: Demo prepared for {{businessName}}
active.startHint: Tap the button to start a live voice call.
active.intakeNotice: This is a limited demo. Live calls work, but booking and other full receptionist features aren't enabled.

invalid.title: This demo link isn't valid
invalid.description: The link may be mistyped or the demo was never created. Ask for a fresh link to try again.

preparing.title: Your demo is being prepared
preparing.titleWithBusiness: The demo for {{businessName}} is being prepared
preparing.description: We're still learning from the website. This usually takes a few minutes, so check back shortly.

expired.title: This demo has expired
expired.description: Demo links are available for a limited time. Reach out to get a new one.

revoked.title: This demo is no longer available
revoked.titleWithBusiness: The demo for {{businessName}} is no longer available
revoked.description: This demo link has been turned off.

claimed.title: This demo has already been claimed
claimed.titleWithBusiness: The demo for {{businessName}} has already been claimed
claimed.description: This receptionist is now owned by a LobbyStack account.

claim.loadingDescription: Claiming your receptionist and getting your workspace ready...
claim.errorDescription: Something went wrong while claiming this demo. Please try again.
claim.unavailableDescription: The demo link is missing or no longer valid.
